name: Recover Transponder
brief: Search several locations for a hidden device and carry it back to safety.
objective: Locate the true transponder and escape over Player's killzone edge while carrying it.

startingNpos.deployment: Wholly within NPO territory, spread evenly across rooms containing objective markers, with intervening terrain in control range when viewed from Player's drop zone.

rules.name: Objective Markers
rules.summary: Set up three objective markers as shown on the mission map.

rules.name: Locate Item
rules.summary: When picking up an unresolved marker, roll D3. The item is found if the result is higher than the number of other markers remaining; otherwise remove that marker.

rules.name: Escape
rules.summary: Player operatives can leave over Player's killzone edge.

victory.win: A player operative carrying the objective marker escapes.

setupChecks.label: Arrange the killzone as shown on the Mission 3 map and identify the Player drop zone and NPO territory.
Place one objective marker at each of the three locations shown on the Mission 3 map.

Generate 2D3+3 starting NPOs and set each up wholly within NPO territory, spread evenly across the rooms containing objective markers, with intervening terrain within its control range when viewed from Player’s drop zone.
Give every starting NPO a Conceal order.
Start with 2CP total and select up to four equipment options, recording and managing both for tabletop play; the Guide does not track or validate their effects.

missionEngine.success: A player operative escaped over Player’s killzone edge while carrying the transponder.
